title: ophrys × varolae
intro: Ophrys × varolae, also known as the false bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that combines the characteristics of its parent species, Ophrys apifera and Ophrys bombyliflora. The medicinal properties of Ophrys × varolae include its ability to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Ophrys × varolae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts can be used in topical applications for skin conditions and wounds.
